channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Trump begins Fourth of July weekend with a symbolic tribute to America's heritage
item.description: Donald Trump returns to Mount Rushmore for Fourth of July fireworks before attending the Salute to America event on the National Mall on Saturday.

item.title: Vulnerable House Democrat's bipartisanship push conflicts with fantasy to 'beat the s--- out of' Hegseth
item.description: Rep. Susie Lee, D-Nev., who is up for reelection in a crucial swing district, said she wanted to 'beat the s--- out of' Pete Hegseth after touting bipartisanship.

item.title: FIRST ON FOX: James Talarico criticized for calling American flag a 'complicated symbol' before Independence Day
item.description: A new ad labels James Talarico an 'America-laster' for describing the American flag as a 'complicated symbol' ahead of the Independence Day holiday.

item.title: James Carville breaks from his famous 'It's the economy, stupid' slogan because of Trump
item.description: James Carville says his 1992 catchphrase 'It's the economy, stupid' now haunts him due to what he calls Trump's current corruption.
